skills.name: Dissonanz
skills.description: Play the flute to stun nearby enemies. If used against hidden enemies, the hiding effects are canceled and they become stunned.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
Range: 160
[Stun] duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Wiegenlied
skills.description: Play the flute to lull nearby enemies to sleep. Sleeping enemies cannot evade or block, and the damage they receive applies as critical. When enemies wake or the duration ends, they have their accuracy momentarily lowered by the Drowsy debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Lullaby Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Maximum 1 Lullaby attack
Drowsy Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Accuracy: - CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Hypnotische Floete
skills.description: Play the flute to hypnotize nearby monsters. Hypnotized monsters will follow your character and become unable to evade or block. Applies only to regular monsters. Your character cannot be knocked back or knocked down during Hypnotische Floete. After the skill, affected enemies become confused.
skills.effect_text:
Targets: CaptionRatio
Confusion Debuff Duration: 3 seconds
Maximum Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Hameln Nagetier
skills.description: When casting certain Pied Piper skills, summons a mouse and applies the Hameln Nagetier buff. You can have a maximum of 5 mice at any time. After the mice are summoned, you can use the Hameln Nagetier skill to have the mice attack by flying to the designated spot. All mice disappear when the Hameln Nagetier buff is canceled.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Attack one target per 1 flied mouse

skills.name: Friedenslied
skills.description: Play the flute to make allies and enemies dance together for 5 seconds. Dancing allies receive no damage, while dancing enemies have one of their buffs removed.

skills.name: Marschierendeslied
skills.description: Applies a buff that makes you and your party members immune to knockback and knockdown. The buff count decreases with each attack received. Movement speed is increased for 5 seconds, and you receive additional defense counts for every party member who is a Swordsman tree character.
skills.effect_text:
Block Count: CaptionRatio
Increases +15 movement speed for 5 seconds
Duration: 60 seconds

skills.name: Lied des Weltbaum
skills.description: Applies a buff that increases damage dealt to the enemy. It nullifies a set number of enemy attacks and nearby enemies will attack those under the buff. (The final efficiency of this buff decreases when the basic ATK of the caster is lower compared to the basic ATK of the target.)
skills.effect_text:
Damage Dealt: + CaptionRatio %
Ignores 3 attacks
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Stegreifspiel
skills.description: Play the flute to deploy one Pied Piper skill at random from the list of skills you have learned. The skill will be activated even if you fail to play the flute, but its effects will be reduced. Stegreifspiel does not affect the cooldown of the skills it activates.
skills.effect_text:
Castable Skills
* Dissonanz
: If failed, duration reduces 50%
* Wiegenlied
: If failed, Drowsy effects reduce by 50%
* Marschierendeslied
: If failed, duration reduces 50%
* Lied des Weltbaum
: If failed, duration reduces 50%
Maximum Level: 1

attributes.name: Hypnotische Floete: Elite
attributes.description:
* Applies [Hypnotische Floete] to Elite monsters as well

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Hameln Nagetier: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hameln Nagetier] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hameln Nagetier: Rare Species
attributes.description:
* 2% chance per attribute level of summoning a rare mouse species

* Rare mice deal 2 hits when attacking [Hameln Nagetier]

attributes.name: Lied des Weltbaum: Duration
attributes.description:
* Increases the duration of [Lied des Weltbaum] by 1 sec per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Stegreifspiel: Reduce Cooldown
attributes.description:
* Reduces the cooldown of [Stegreifspiel] by 10 sec

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Stegreifspiel: Lied des Weltbaum
attributes.description: * [Stegreifspiel] will always trigger [Lied des Weltbaum] upon use

attributes.name: [Arts] Hameln Nagetier: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Hameln Nagetier] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts]Friedenslied: SmileClap
attributes.description: * [Friedenslied] can be used while moving and only applied to enemy. Debuff applies to enemy in range, dances [Smile~Clap] by the chance of 50% for a certain period
